phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les heures d'ouverture de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son layz UHR doo-vair-TYOR duh lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is open daily for visits. Hours may vary for services.

responses.english: From 9 AM to 6 PM, every day.
responses.phonetic: duh nuhf UHR ah dee-ZWEET UHR, too lay ZHOOR
responses.local: De neuf heures à dix-huit heures, tous les jours.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the crypt beneath the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une crypte sous la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon KRIPT soo lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The crypt contains the tombs of the bishops of Saint-Malo. It's open to visitors during cathedral opening hours.

responses.phonetic: byan sewr, zhuh voo ah-PROHNT sah too deh SWEET
responses.local: Oui, accessible pendant les heures d'ouverture.

phrases.text_local: L'entrée de la cathédrale est-elle gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lahn-TRAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAL eh-tel grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: As with most churches in France, entry to the cathedral is free.

phrases.text_local: Peut-on prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TON PRAHN-druh day FOH-toh ah lan-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Photos without flash are usually permitted in French churches.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Jacques Cartier is buried
phrases.cultural_note: Jacques Cartier, the explorer who discovered Canada, is buried in Saint-Malo. His tomb is in the cathedral's south aisle.

responses.english: In the south aisle, inside the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: Dans le bas-côté sud, à l'intérieur de la cathédrale.
